image_information: This image shows an outdoor square on a sunny day. In the center of the picture is a sidewalk paved with large stone bricks. The road is clean and wide, suitable for pedestrians. In the upper left corner is a lawn with a brick flower bed with brightly colored plants and some garbage and cardboard scattered around. In the upper right corner is a temporary stall or rest area with parasols, and several people are in the shade. Street lights are also installed on the side of the road. The overall environment has the openness and life of a public space.
